creator: mi@privatelabs.com
text:
On  6 Jun, KATO Tsuguru wrote:
 = > 	the  port  was  installing  the  pbm(5)  man  page  into
 = > 	${PREFIX}/man/man5  needlessly --  FreeBSD  has its  own
 = > 	pbm.5 in /usr/share/man/man5 with very similar wording.
 = > 
 = > 	This was also noticed by Mr. KATO Tsuguru.
 = 
 = Well, Although I didn't explained clearly, I proposed maintainer 
 = to remove 'both' pbm.5 and pgm.5 with another intention - these 
 = man pages conflict with netpbm port.
 
 
 Oops, I did not notice this... Let me resubmit... Thanks!
 
 	-mi
 
 = And then, at least pgm(5) has almost nothing to do with jbigkit. 
 = I cannot see why it's included.
